title: AEP v1.1 A6 Pilot Observation TTL
description: v1.1 A6 amendment (STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE × CONTEXT-BOUND PATTERN). Two-agent convergence (curator-IDEA-5 + adversary-IDEA-6). Was F11a in legion synthesis; split out as independent amendment per HV-6 closure. TTL + auto-action_on_expire on pilot-promoted claims. Forces pilot-to-LANDED re-audit gate. M1 closure: revalidation_evidence_artifact_sha256 MUST be unique per revalidation (anti-ritual-revalidation Goodhart). Composes_with: sec02 truth-tags (PILOT tier semantics), sec73.5 warden-receipts-or-halt.

ttl_ms.description: TTL in milliseconds. Claim-class default per SPEC (NOT author-discretion) per F11 risk mitigation.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC expiration timestamp. Validator-computed from emit_time + ttl_ms.

action_on_expire.description: Action when TTL expires without revalidation. WARN = log only. DOWNGRADE = truth-tag downgraded one tier. QUARANTINE = claim isolated. FALSIFY = treated as falsified.

decay_function.description: Decay function shape. SM2_LITE inherits v1.0.3 RegexicalCue precedent.

last_revalidation_event_id.description: Reference into ops/events.jsonl. null if no revalidation observed.

revalidation_evidence_artifact_sha256.description: M1 CLOSURE: sha256 of the evidence artifact that backed the last revalidation. Validator REJECTS revalidation if this matches a PRIOR revalidation's sha256 (anti-ritual-revalidation Goodhart). Each revalidation MUST present new evidence.

revalidation_history.description: Append-only history of revalidations. Each entry's evidence_artifact_sha256 MUST be unique (M1 closure).
